summary: The slash command auto-completion was fixed by adding a ref to track the first item and automatically focusing it when the dropdown appears. The implementation added useRef to create firstItemRef, attached it to the first command item with tabIndex={0} for focusability, and enhanced the existing useEffect to call firstItemRef.current.focus() whenever the filtered command list updates.
